title: Bosch Professional 9pc PointTeQ Hex Drill Bit Set (for Metal, Ø: 2-8 mm, Total Length: 60-117 mm, ¼’’ Hex Shank, Accessory for Impact Drivers and Drill Drivers)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: Scope of Supply: 1 x 2.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 24 mm), 1 x 2.5 mm drill bit (Working Length: 30 mm), 1 x 3.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 33 mm), 1 x 3.5 mm drill bit (Working Length: 39 mm), 1 x 4.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 43 mm), 1 x 5.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 52 mm), 1 x 6.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 57 mm), 1 x 7.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 69 mm), 1 x 8.0 mm drill bit (Working Length: 75 mm),
No Bit Slippage: For more reliable drilling without bit slippage, the ¼’’ hex shank locks securely in the chuck of the drill driver or impact driver
Suitable for Metal: This drill bit is suitable for use with sheet metal, aluminum, and construction steel, as well as plastic and wood
Fast & Easy Start: Get drilling quickly and efficiently without the need to pre-punch or pilot drill thanks to the self-centering PointTeQ tip
Universal Fit: This drill bit is universally compatible with drill drivers and impact drivers with ¼’’ hexagonal interface from all brands

Previous page Quick & Efficient Drilling With a self-centering tip and black-oxide coated flute for fast chip removal, the HSS PointTeQ drill bit enables efficient drilling. Easy To Use The bits are easy to use, with a quick changeover time and a ¼’’ hex shank that locks into place to eliminate bit slippage. Universal Compatibility Thanks to a ¼’’ hex shank, the bit is universally compatible with impact and drill drivers from all brands.
